name: monitor_system_task
description: Code should include a $monitor system task call with a format string and variable arguments to monitor signal changes.

name: monitorb_system_task
description: Code should include a $monitorb system task call that prints arguments in binary format when any argument changes.

name: monitoro_system_task
description: Code should include a $monitoro system task call that prints arguments in octal format when any argument changes.

name: monitorh_system_task
description: Code should include a $monitorh system task call that prints arguments in hexadecimal format when any argument changes.

name: monitoron_system_task
description: Code should include a $monitoron system task call to enable monitoring globally.

name: monitoroff_system_task
description: Code should include a $monitoroff system task call to disable monitoring globally.
